title: KTET Result 2026 Overview

detail.title: KTET Result 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: KTET Result 2026 declared for Feb 21 & 23 exams. Check Kerala Teacher Eligibility Test scorecard, qualifying marks & download certificate at ktet.kerala.gov.in now.

content.text: KTET Result 2026 has been officially declared by Kerala Pareeksha Bhavan for the Teacher Eligibility Test conducted on February 21 and 23, 2026. Candidates who appeared for Categories 1, 2, 3, and 4 can now check their Kerala TET scores and download scorecards from the official portal at ktet.kerala.gov.in. The result is accessible online using registration number and date of birth as login credentials. Over thousands of teaching aspirants from across Kerala are checking their results today to know their qualifying status. The KTET certificate carries lifetime validity and serves as a mandatory qualification for securing government teaching positions in Kerala schools.
Click Here: Kerala Teacher Eligibility Test Result 2026

sections.heading: How to Check KTET Result 2026 Online

content.text: Checking your KTET 2026 result is pretty straightforward if you follow these steps carefully:

items: Visit the official portal at ktet.kerala.gov.in
Look for the link titled "KTET FEBRUARY 2026 RESULT" on homepage
Select your exam Category (1, 2, 3, or 4) from dropdown
Enter your Register Number and Date of Birth in required fields
Click on "Check Results" button to view score
Download the result sheet as PDF and take printout for future reference

content.text: The scorecard will display on your screen immediately after clicking the check results button. Make sure you save it properly because you'll need it for teaching job applications later.
While downloading your KTET scorecard, keep these details handy:

items: KTET registration number (received during application)
Date of birth as per application form
Category selected during registration
Valid email ID for saving PDF copy

content.text: What to Do After Checking Result
If you've qualified the KTET exam, here are your next steps:

items: Download and save multiple copies of your scorecard in PDF format
Take printouts and keep them safely for future job applications
Register on Kerala PSC website for teacher recruitment notifications
Start preparing for Kerala PSC exams specific to teaching positions
Keep checking official websites for latest recruitment announcements
Update your resume with KTET qualification details
